media.title: Sources: Caldwell-Pope opts into $21.6 million deal with Grizzlies
media.description: Veteran guard Kentavious Caldwell-Pope is exercising his $21.6 million player option with the Grizzlies for the 2026-27 season, sources tell ESPN.

items.title: 2026 NBA Finals Preview: KCP Talks WCF Game 7, Chet Holmgren, Knicks vs Spurs, and more! | EP52
items.author: The Dawg Talk Podcast
items.body_excerpt: On this episode of Dawg Talk, 2x NBA Champion, Kentavious Caldwell-Pope and J-Mac break down the San Antonio Spurs' Game 7 victory over the Oklahoma City Thunder and preview a highly anticipated NBA Finals matchup between the Spurs and New York Knicks. KCP gives his reaction to…
